## Agent Checklist

- [ ] Branch was created from updated `main`
- [ ] Plan was written before implementation
- [ ] Human approved the plan before implementation started
- [ ] Each plan step is represented by a focused commit, or the PR explains why not
- [ ] Diff is minimal and focused
- [ ] No local visual testing was attempted
- [ ] User-facing copy changes include message/changelog updates where needed
